title: hwdsl2/docker-ollama
summary: Docker image to run an Ollama local LLM server. Secure by default, all API requests require a Bearer token (auto-generated on first start). OpenAI-compatible API. Supports first-start model pre-pull, NVIDIA GPU (CUDA) acceleration, and persistent model storage. Multi-arch: amd64, arm64.

title: hwdsl2/docker-litellm
summary: Docker image for a self-hosted LiteLLM AI gateway proxy. Unified OpenAI-compatible API for 100+ LLM providers. Features auto-config on first start, virtual key management, spend tracking, and persistent data via Docker volume.

title: DaroHacka/proactive-sebastian-ai-companion
summary: Sebastian Proactive is a lightweight, local‑first AI companion designed to initiate interactions instead of waiting for prompts. It runs entirely on your machine through Ollama and uses a modular library system, a probabilistic selector, and a proactive scheduler to generate context‑aware messages at configurable intervals.

title: PatriceA/octipus
summary: An open-source, self-hosted assistant that delegates real work to a swarm of specialist AI agents.

title: Doro2047/codecraft
summary: 🚀 CodeCraft - AI编程助手桌面应用 | Electron+React+Rust高性能架构 | 多LLM支持(OpenAI/Anthropic/Ollama/llama.cpp) | MCP协议扩展 | 本地优先设计 | 内置Monaco编辑器与Git集成

title: Toommo2/Text2CAD
summary: 🚀 Convert natural language to real CAD artifacts with Text2CAD, an agent-driven system for deterministic and validated engineering workflows.

title: Retamoso23/ollixir
summary: 🤖 Enable local large language models with Ollixir, the Elixir client mirroring the ollama-python library for seamless chat, generation, and model management.

title: AsadKhan05/WeChat-AI-Bot-Java-Python
summary: 🤖 Build a local AI chatbot for WeChat using Java, Python, and MySQL, featuring advanced emotional support and complete data privacy.

title: jeffgeiser/Wicklee
summary: Sovereign-first local AI inference monitor. Hardware-aware WES scores, thermal intelligence, and 18 observation patterns for Ollama & vLLM.

summary: Local-first personal automation platform for workflows, RAG/GraphRAG search, review queues, genealogy/media evidence, and operator-guided agents.

summary: Self-hosted, AI-agent-driven knowledge OS — multi-LLM (Gemini/Ollama), 12 agents, knowledge graph, real-time collaboration. AGPLv3.

summary: Privacy-first developer intelligence — surfaces what matters from the noise

summary: Poindexter — open-source AI content pipeline that researches, writes, reviews, and publishes autonomously. Self-hosted on your machine. Built by Glad Labs LLC.

summary: 📄 Simplify document search and Q&A with a complete RAG system, enabling smart retrieval and generation using local LLM models.

summary: Memory that remembers the story not just the facts. Three layer  sentence graph for AI agents -> Facts, Episodes, raw Sentences.   One DB. Zero config.
